creator: anders@fix.no
text:
On Sun, Dec 10, 2000 at 09:37:32PM -0600, Steve Price wrote:
> #  | New port of gdrdao, a GTK frontend for cdrdao (the disk-at-once audio CD
> #  | recorder).
> #  
> #  You are lacking this:
> #            LIB_DEPENDS=gnome.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11/gnomelibs
> 
> Or better yet 'USE_GNOMELIBS=yes'? :)

Ok. But can we get it comitted now? USE_GNOMELIBS seems to be the only part
missing to me.

Cheers,

-- 
Anders.
